relations.note: Signature button radius is a mandatory detail of the gradient callout CTA.
Background asset rule applies together with the CTA layout composition.

quotes: a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.
with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces
A full-width banner where a **headline** and a **single button** are overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked.
**Headline** → Brand Blue `#00529b`, centered, sitting in the **top third**, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line.

**Button** → centered, in the **lower-middle** below the headline. Fill Deep Blue `#003D74`, white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px), with a Gold `#FFC20E` arrow `›` (24px) after two non-breaking spaces. Size 248 × 64px.

rules.intent: Preserve the approved gradient callout CTA composition and colors.
rules.rule_text: The Gradient Callout CTA is a full-width banner with a headline and a single button overlaid on the branded orange/yellow gradient image, both horizontally centered and stacked. The headline is Brand Blue (#00529b), centered, in the top third, Nunito Sans weight 800, ~28px, one line. Section padding is 48px 25px 56px 25px; headline padding is 0 0 32px 0. The button is centered in the lower-middle below the headline, fill Deep Blue #003D74 with a white label (Nunito Sans 800, 18px) and a Gold #FFC20E arrow '›' (24px) after two non-breaking spaces, sized 248 × 64px.
rules.snippets:
<mj-text align="center" color="#00529b" font-family="Nunito Sans, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif" font-size="28px" font-weight="800" line-height="34px" padding="0 0 32px 0">
      Talk to your doctor about how LISRAYA can help
    </mj-text>

quotes:
<mj-text
        align="center"
        color="#00529b"
        font-family="Nunito Sans, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif"
        font-size="28px"
        font-weight="800"
        line-height="34px"
        padding="0 0 32px 0">
the gradient PNG, applied as the section background, sized `cover`, `no-repeat`, centered, spanning the full content width (600px)
Always set a solid `background-color` of Sunshine `#faa31b` as fallback, since clients like Outlook drop background images.
do not re-host or recolor. The background may be skipped **only in very, very rare cases**

If the background must be skipped, remove only `background-url`, `background-size`, `background-repeat`, and `background-position` — keep `background-color="#faa31b"` and the headline color, button color, and button radius exactly as above.

rules.intent: Lock the approved gradient background asset with a reliable fallback.
rules.rule_text: The section background is the Gradient_callout.png asset (https://solstice-public-forever.s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com/design_library/12912e15-c371-4bf0-a5b9-08a7f8c57d20/7772aba5-1ff5-4985-80bf-c15b782111a4/Gradient_callout.png), sized cover, no-repeat, centered, spanning the full content width (600px). Do not re-host or recolor it. Always set a solid background-color of Sunshine #faa31b as fallback since clients like Outlook drop background images. The background image may be skipped only in very, very rare cases (plain-text/AMP fallback, a client that strips all images, a hard size budget); when skipped, the section still renders on the solid Sunshine #faa31b fill and every other rule stays identical.

quotes: `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape

**Button radius (mandatory, never change):** `border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px;` — this four-value asymmetric radius is the signature shape and is **always required on every instance**, even when the background is skipped.
Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.

rules.intent: Protect the signature asymmetric CTA button shape.
rules.rule_text: The gradient callout button uses the mandatory four-value asymmetric signature radius (border-radius: 49.52px 1.76px 40px 1.76px). This is always required on every instance, even when the background is skipped. Never simplify it to a single value, swap the corners, or round the decimals.
